sections.paragraph:
and שֵׁטֶף m.

(1) effusion, outpouring, e.g. of rain, Job 38:25 of a torrent, whence metaph. Pro 27:4 שֵׁטֶף אַף “an outpouring, i.e. a torrent (like a rapid torrent) is anger.”

(2) inundation, flood, Psa 32:6 Nah 1:8 Dan 9:26 קִצֹּו בַשֶּׁטֶף “his end (cometh) as a flood,” i.e. suddenly (compare בַּשַּׁחַר Hos 10:15.) Metaph. used of an overflowing army, Dan 11:22.
